summary.summary: Update Config.xcconfig to bump APP_DEV_VERSION from 0.8.4.14 to 0.8.4.15. The diff and file show only the APP_DEV_VERSION line changed (diff:ba98210d98cf, file:4ed423be6cdf), and the commit message records this CI/version bump (commit:a874fa088d33).
summary.userFacingImpact: Likely no change to runtime behavior; this is a build/developer version metadata increment in Config.xcconfig (file:4ed423be6cdf, diff:ba98210d98cf). If there are concerns about release/versioning processes, review CI/release tooling separately.
